name: copycat
description: A multilingual social-deduction party game that runs inside ChatGPT.

interface.shortDescription: Find the player who does not know the secret word.
interface.longDescription: Play a realtime social-deduction game in ChatGPT with global matchmaking, private rooms, instant CPU practice, optional ChatGPT-controlled players, and per-player multilingual hints.
defaultPrompt: Open COPYCAT and find players for me.
Start a quick COPYCAT game against CPUs.
Create a private COPYCAT room for my friends.
